title: [profcheck][instcombine] Propagate branch weigths in folded GEP
author: mtrofin
description:
Patch following #170439. The branch weigths of the new select are the same as of the original's.

Issue #147390

tests.test_body:
define <2 x ptr> @fail_scalar_const_vector_select(i32 %arg0, <2 x ptr> %arg1) {
  %v0 = getelementptr i8, <2 x ptr> %arg1, i64 8148
  %v1 = icmp sgt i32 %arg0, 3
  %v2 = select i1 %v1, <2 x i64> <i64 55104, i64 56654>, <2 x i64> <i64 21304, i64 21224>
  %v3 = getelementptr i8, <2 x ptr> %v0, <2 x i64> %v2
  ret <2 x ptr> %v3
}

comments.author: mtrofin
comments.body:
> Given the condition is the same, LGTM.

I'll merge so the profcheck bot turns green, and given the comments on the original PR, and if the reviewers have additional comments, will be happy to incorporate subsequently.
